name: worker_skill
description: Instantiate a text-only sub-agent for tasks that would pollute the main context window: summarizing large documents, cross-referencing multiple files, isolated analysis or classification tasks. Do NOT use for file I/O, sequential workspace operations, or anything you can do directly with file_reader/file_writer/shell_run. The worker has no access to tools or the filesystem — it can only reason and return text.

task.description: Task description to give the worker sub-agent.

persona.description: System prompt / persona for the worker. Defaults to a generic focused sub-agent.

context.description: Additional context prepended to the task message.
